overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing tactical exploration of a luxurious modern Japanese residence. The player character moves through traditional tatami rooms with scattered money, transitions through modern interior spaces with glass ceilings, and navigates outdoor courtyard areas with traditional and contemporary architecture overlooking the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese living room with tatami flooring and scattered cash

events.description: camera pans down to reveal scattered cash bills covering the floor and coffee table
camera turns toward large window revealing bright exterior view and direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: tactically moving through traditional room while holding pistol, examining the scattered money and furnishings

light-colored upholstered sofa with cushions

wall-mounted framed painting depicting traditional Japanese scenery

segments.scene_description: The player explores a traditional Japanese-style living room with shoji screens and tatami flooring. Scattered cash bills cover the floor and coffee table. The camera pans around the room, revealing a wooden sideboard and framed artwork, before turning toward a large window that offers a glimpse of the exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area near large window with ocean view

events.description: looking out window reveals traditional Japanese architecture and ocean vista
turning away from window and moving toward the room exit doorway

agents.ego_description: pausing to look out the window at the scenic view of traditional buildings and ocean, then turning to exit

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling window providing view of exterior architecture and ocean
tiled curved roof of adjacent building visible through window
blue ocean and distant mountains visible through the window

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the large window, revealing a stunning view of traditional Japanese architecture, ocean, and distant mountains. After observing the exterior, the character turns away from the window and moves toward the room's exit doorway, transitioning from the traditional space.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern interior hallway with glass skylight ceiling

events.description: passing through doorway from traditional room into modern hallway with glass ceiling
moving from artificial lighting toward bright exterior exit with natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: moving from the traditional room through a doorway into a spacious modern interior with high ceilings and display shelves

entered.detail: spacious corridor with polished floors transitioning between architectural styles
transparent ceiling panels allowing natural light to flood the interior space
built-in shelving with warm lighting showcasing decorative vases and objects
contemporary kitchen area with wooden cabinetry and bar seating

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the traditional room into a modern interior hallway featuring a glass skylight ceiling and illuminated display shelves. The space showcases a blend of contemporary design with wooden accents, including a modern kitchen area visible to the left. The character moves steadily toward an exterior doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor courtyard with stone stairs and modern landscaping

events.description: exiting building into bright outdoor courtyard with stone stairs and garden elements
ascending stone stairs and turning along pathway between concrete walls

agents.ego_description: exiting the building into an outdoor courtyard and ascending stone stairs while maintaining tactical posture

entered.detail: open paved area with modern landscaping and architectural elements
wide concrete staircase leading upward between building structures
tall green bamboo stalks in planters along the building exterior
tall concrete wall with climbing green ivy vegetation
pathway with loose gravel surface between concrete structures
contemporary building facade with clean lines and large windows

segments.scene_description: The player exits into a bright outdoor courtyard featuring stone stairs, bamboo plantings, and ivy-covered concrete walls. The environment transitions from interior to exterior with full sky visibility and direct sunlight. The character ascends the stairs and navigates along a gravel pathway between modern building structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior room under renovation with wooden flooring

events.description: entering secondary building through doorway into room with wooden floors

agents.ego_description: entering a secondary interior room with wooden flooring and cleaning equipment visible

entered.detail: interior space with light wooden plank flooring and minimal furnishings
janitorial equipment cart with cleaning supplies indicating maintenance activity
large framed artwork depicting coastal landscape with rock formations
traditional style sliding door with wooden frame

segments.scene_description: The player enters a secondary interior room with wooden flooring, appearing to be under renovation or cleaning. A yellow cleaning cart sits near a sliding wooden door, and a large landscape painting hangs on the wall. The space is more utilitarian compared to the previous luxurious areas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a luxurious traditional Japanese interior through a modern hallway and into a bright outdoor courtyard before ending in a utilitarian service room. It begins by panning across a tatami living room scattered with cash bills and framed artwork, before turning toward a large window that reveals a vista of the ocean and distant mountains. As the camera moves away from the view, the scene shifts from the traditional space into a contemporary hallway characterized by a glass skylight ceiling and illuminated display shelves. The movement then carries the viewer through an exterior doorway into a sunlit courtyard with stone stairs, bamboo, and ivy-covered walls, navigating a gravel path between modern structures. Finally, the camera enters a secondary interior room with wooden flooring, where the luxury of the previous spaces gives way to a more functional environment featuring a yellow cleaning cart and a large landscape painting.
